summary: Store.List returns all rows for a non-positive limit instead of defaulting to LIMIT 200.
reason: Every offline analytic (spend, debts, ledger, balances, recurring, activity) reads via db.List(rt, 0); the 200-row default silently aggregated an arbitrary ~200 of N synced rows ordered by sync time, dropping expenses from every report even when the cache was complete.
validated_outcome: debts --aged null entries 7/9 -> 1/9 and spend --group-by month range 2024 -> 2026 on a 638-expense account.
